case_title: SANTAMARIA, JUAN J. VS ALL STATE PROEPRTY AND CASUALITY INSURANCE CO.

docket_entries.description: CERTIFIED MAIL TO CT CORPORATION RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTAMARIA, JUAN J. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALL STATE PROEPRTY AND CASUALITY INSURANCE CO. $260.14 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $292.14, DEFT. TO PAY FOR FURTHER REPAIRS TO PLFT'S AUTO AS FOLLOWS: ALIGN REAR BUMPER; ALIGN REAR RECEIVER; REPAIR DOOR CLOSING PROBLEM; REMOVE OVERSPRAY; IF "CHECK ENGINE" OR "BRAKE" LIGHTS ARE CAUSED BY PRIOR ACCIDENT; ALLSTATE THEN REQUIRED TO PAY FOR RELATED REPAIRS. DEFT TO PAY RENTAL CAR DURING THE REPAIRS CALLED HEREIN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SANTAMARIA, JUAN J. AS TO DEFENDANT ALL STATE PROEPRTY AND CASUALITY INSURANCE CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
